title: Pax (disambiguation)
content:
'''Pax''' can refer to the following:

==Canon==
*'''[[Pax (clone trooper)|Pax]]''', a [[clone trooper]]
*'''[[Pax]]''', an [[Expansion Region]] astronomical object
*[[Pax (pirate)|'''Pax''']], a [[Gran]] [[pirate]]
*'''[[Pax Maripher]]''', a gemstone [[thief]]
*'''[[Darius Pax]]''', an individual who ran the [[Galactic League (racing)|Galactic League]]
*'''[[Ferrok Pax]]''', a location that was once the home of the kingdom of a proto-[[species]]

==Legends==
*The '''[[Pax system/Legends|Pax system]]''', the star system containing the planet [[Plagen]]
*'''[[Pax Bonkik]]''', a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]
*'''[[Pax Chizzik]]''', a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]
*'''[[Pax Teem]]''', a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] member of the [[Gran Protectorate/Legends|Gran Protectorate]] and a [[Senator/Legends|senator]].

{{Disambig}}

|fr=Pax (homonymie)

}}
